entities.name: WATER
entities.description: A limiting factor in agriculture due to unpredictable rainfall and competition from human and industrial uses

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The sector where water is a limiting factor for productivity

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: An unpredictable natural factor affecting water availability

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The output of farming that needs to be sustained through efficient systems

entities.name: WATER-USE-EFFICIENT SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems required to sustain agricultural productivity under water limitations

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION-EFFICIENT CULTIVARS
entities.description: Plant varieties that serve as a key component of water-use-efficient systems
